name: Lady Annabella - Feminist in the Wild West
description:
Annabella is the spoiled daugher of one of the richest railway magnates in America. The year is 1875 and she's travelling the wild west to overlook the construction of a new railway. She's a very sophisticated lady who's about to experience the brutality of the old america for the first time. And also she's a feminist!

I really wanted to find a pic of a girl tied to a railway, but it's literally impossible i guess.
creator: Jeopopp
